title: Chor #2735
definition:
Hor-hagidgad = "cavern of Gidgad"

 1) a desert station of Israel in the wilderness; site unknown
nasbUsage:

 1) a desert station of Israel in the wilderness; site unknown

    NASB:  hollow of Gidgad, a place in the S. desert
